# Abdulkodir Faxriddinov — Developer Portfolio

## Identity
- Full name: Abdulkodir Faxriddinov (also: Abduqodir Faxriddinov, moy-kanal-17)
- Born: April 22, 2011
- Location: Tashkent, Uzbekistan
- Role: Backend & Fullstack Developer

## Skills
Node.js, NestJS, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Socket.IO, JWT, Python, Telegram Bots, AI/LLM (Gemini, g4f), Sequelize ORM, REST API, WebSocket

## Projects
1. Telegram Clone Chat — NestJS + Socket.IO + React real-time messenger
2. Kutube — Video hosting platform (NestJS + PostgreSQL)
3. Online Market — Marketplace (React + NestJS + PostgreSQL + Sequelize)
4. Jarvis AI — Python voice assistant with LLM integration
